areas.name: Business and Society
areas.description: How businesses, executives, and economic elites engage with politics, regulation, and ethics.

areas.name: Political Polarization
areas.description: The origins and consequences of partisan animosity in American politics and everyday life.

areas.name: Social Media and Politics
areas.description: Large-scale field experiments on how social media platforms shape political attitudes and behavior, from the U.S. 2020 Facebook and Instagram Election Study.

areas.name: Survey Methodology
areas.description: Measurement, sampling, and design in public opinion research.

areas.name: Retrospective Voting
areas.description: How voters reward and punish governments for events and policy, including natural disasters.

areas.name: Publication Bias
areas.description: How publication and reporting practices shape the published scientific record, and efforts to promote research transparency.
